acc_A_0.0_46.amendment_direction: Delegates power to the Commission to amend annexes defining AI systems, high-risk AI categories, conformity assessment procedures, and related technical provisions via delegated acts.

acc_A_0.0_49.amendment_direction: Empowers the Commission to update the list of high-risk AI systems in Annex III via delegated acts, using specific criteria (intended purpose, extent of use, severity of harm, vulnerability of affected persons, reversibility, etc.) to assess whether new AI systems pose equivalent or greater risks than those already listed.

Both push in the same direction of making the high-risk determination more substantive and criteria-based, even though BEUC also argued for a broader horizontal scope beyond sector-based lists.
